---
title: "Publications"
---

## Publications

You can organize this page in one of two easy ways:

### Option 1: Simple manual list

- Author, A., **Arroyo, G.**, Author, B. (2026), *Title of paper*, Journal, Volume, Page. [ADS](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/)
- **Arroyo, G.**, Author, A. (2025), *Another paper title*, Journal, Volume, Page. [ADS](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/) | [Publisher](https://example.com)

### Option 2: External profiles

You can also keep this page short and link directly to:

- [ADS profile](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
- [arXiv author search](https://arxiv.org/)

## Preprints and in preparation

- Working title of current manuscript
- Working title of collaboration paper

## Talks and posters

- Conference name, year — talk title
- Workshop name, year — poster title
